titleStmt.title: SII 9.545: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 545. (A.R. No. 175 of 1910.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE CENTRE OF THE VILLAGE ERAGANAHALLI, GOPICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 1454, Nandana, Jyēshṭha, śu. [5, Guruvāra], corresponding to A.D. 1532 May 9, Thursday, in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records that, under the orders of Kāṇikeya Kampadēvarasaṇṇa and in the presence of Beṇṇeya, the Sthānikas of eight villages and Pārapatyagāra Koṇḍappayya, Sēnabōva Gummaṭayya and the Gauḍas of the Baḍakoṅga-nāḍu, the apportionment of some plots of land in Eṟaganahaḷḷi was made among Bhōganañjayya, son of Nañjeyadēva, Annadāni-Voḍeya, son of Parvata-Voḍeya of the feeding-house of the Jaṅgamas, and Dēvaṇṇa-Ayya, son of Liṅgappayya of the feeding-house of the Brāhmans.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanasakavaru
ṣa 1454 neya saṁda naṁdanasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa
śu 5 gu lū śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa Accutarāyamahārāyaru
rājyaṁgaivalli kāṇikeya kaṁpadēvarasaṁṇanavara ni
rūpadiṁda beṁṇeyanavara muṁdiṭṭu Eṁṭu haḷḷiga
ḷa sthānikara muṁdiṭṭu gājanūra sthaḷakke pārupatyava māḍu
va kkoṁḍappayyanavaru sēnabōva guṁmaṭṭayyanavaru siddappa
voḍeyaru vāsudēva bagutteyada voḷagāda baḍakoṁganāḍastha
ḷada gavuḍagaḷa muṁdiṭṭu kapilā kauṁḍinī saṁgamakṣētradali pra(ṁ)saṁ
narāda naṁjalurūḍa śrīnaṁjuṁḍēśvaradēvara saṁnidhiyalli naḍa
vaṁthā chatrada yeṟaganahaḷḷiya grāmadalli 2 bhāgavāgi bhāgiyanū
jaṁgamachatrada parvatavoḍeyara makkaḷu A(ṁ)nnadānivoḍeyaru naṁjeya
dēvara makkaḷu bhōganaṁjayyanavaru brāhmaṇachatrada liṁgappaAyyana
vara makkaḷu dēvaṁṇaAyyanavarige koṭṭa grāmada hasigeya vivara ye
ṟaganahaḷḷiya grāmada bīrappagauḍana manege mūḍaṇa halageya grāma
baḍagaṇa tiṭṭina bhūmi paḍavalu basavanakaṭṭeya vōṇiya vobbe mēre
yāgi beḷageṟeya paḍuvaṇa kōḍi mēreyāgi salluvudu teṁkalu daṁḍina dā
riya mūḍaṇa vōṇi mēreyāgi gōvana hoṁḍa doṇe bāvi voḷagāgi haḷḷa mēre
yāgi mūḍaṇa toṭṭada bbe mēre nārigaṭṭada sīmege nēṟalumara hola voḷa gā
gi māvina tāḷakaitōṭa voḷagāgi salluvudu nārigaṭṭada mūḍaṇa bbe mēre sappa
nadaṟeya vobbe mēre kāḷuva kkuṁmariya vobbe mēre saṁbudēvana takkilavo
bbe mērayāgi mattitāḷada vobbe mēre beḷageṟeya mūḍaṇa kō
ḍi mēreyāgi baḍagaṇa kaṭṭige salluvudu kōḍipurada grāmakke salluva
sīme teṁkalu beḷageṟeya dāri mēreyāgi paḍuvaṇa kōḍiya paṭṭada Arasiya vōṇi
mēreyāgi toṟeya haḷḷa mēreyāgi salluvudu mūḍalu tūbina tāḷavōṇi
ya teṁkaṇa vobbemēreyāgi purakke giḍu salluvudu .
cillahaḷḷiya grāmakke salluva pura kuṁmaripura lakharasanapura sīgallachatra
�yo mūṟu puragrāmagaḷu cillahaḷḷige salluvudu cillahaḷḷiya grāmakke salluva
cattusīme kuṁmariyapurakke salluva catussīme lakharasanapurakke salluva catussīme
sīgallachatrakke salluva catussīme cillahaḷḷiya grāma
saṁdu bahudu .
Digital edition of SII 9.545 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
